sutta: 144 once while dwelling near sakita at 3 dawn grove the exalted 1 addressed the monk saying monks lord they replied and the exalted 1 said monks good is it for a time for a monk from time to time to abide conscious of the distasteful in what is not distasteful conscious of what is not distasteful in the distasteful conscious of the distasteful in both what is not and what is distasteful conscious of what is not distasteful in both what is and what is not distasteful monks good is it for a monk from time to time rid of all that both the distasteful and what is not to abide in equanimity mindful and self-possessed monks pressing toward what good mark or what good aim should among abide conscious of the distasteful in what is not distasteful he thinks to himself may the passion of impassioning states search not within me it is verily oppressing towards this good mark that among abides conscious of the distasteful in what is not distasteful and pressing toward what good mark should a monk abide conscious of what is not distasteful in the distasteful may the defilement of the filing states search not within me it is verily pressing towards this good mom that the monk abides thus and pressing towards what good mark should among abide conscious of the distasteful in both 1 is not and what is distasteful [Music] may the passion of impassioning states and the defilement of the filing states search not within me it is verily thus and pressing toward what good mark should a man abide conscious of what is not distasteful in both what is and what is not distasteful may the development of the filing states and the passion of impassioning states search not within me it is verily pressing toward this good man that among abides conscious of what is not distasteful in both what is and what is not distasteful monks pressing toward what good mark should a man abide in equanimity mindful and self-possessed rid of both that is distasteful and what is not distasteful may never anywhere in any place in any way within me search the passion of impassioning states may never anywhere in any place in any way search within me the development of the filing states may never anywhere in any place in any way within me search the confusion of confounding states it is verily pressing toward this good mark that among abides in equanimity mindful and self-possessed rid of both the distasteful and what is not distasteful that's the end of the suta
